title: Curry Wrap
description: A simple and flavorful wrap made with curry and malty ingredients. Perfect for a quick lunch or snack.
instructions: Preheat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add curry paste and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add cooked rice and stir to combine with curry paste.
Add chopped kale and stir-fry until wilted.
Warm the tortilla in the skillet for 30 seconds on each side.
Assemble the wrap by spooning the curry rice mixture onto the tortilla.
Top with additional kale or rice, if desired.
